Deprecated API

Contents

  • Classes
  • Methods
  • Deprecated Classes
    Class
    Description
    de.bsommerfeld.pathetic.engine.result.PathUtils
    Pathetic's future focus will rely heavily on finding paths, not modifying or post-processing them. This class is maintained for backward compatibility until a dedicated post-processing module is available.
  • Deprecated Methods
    Method
    Description
    de.bsommerfeld.pathetic.api.factory.PathfinderFactory.createPathfinder()
    Use PathfinderFactory.createPathfinder(PathfinderConfiguration) with an explicit configuration that supplies a real NavigationPointProvider. Calling this no-arg overload almost always indicates a misconfiguration.
    de.bsommerfeld.pathetic.api.pathing.configuration.PathfinderConfiguration.PathfinderConfigurationBuilder.nodeCostProcessors(List<CostProcessor>)
    de.bsommerfeld.pathetic.api.pathing.configuration.PathfinderConfiguration.PathfinderConfigurationBuilder.nodeValidationProcessors(List<ValidationProcessor>)
    de.bsommerfeld.pathetic.api.pathing.Pathfinder.registerPathfindingHook(PathfinderHook)
    Use PathfinderConfiguration.PathfinderConfigurationBuilder.pathfindingHooks(java.util.List) to configure hooks in the PathfinderConfiguration instead.
    de.bsommerfeld.pathetic.api.pathing.processing.Cost.getValue()
    Use Cost.value() instead.
    de.bsommerfeld.pathetic.api.util.NumberUtils.sqrt(double)
    Call Math.sqrt(double) directly. This now simply delegates to it; the former bit-hack approximation was less precise than the JDK intrinsic (and wrong at 0) without being faster.
    de.bsommerfeld.pathetic.api.wrapper.Depth.getValue()
    Depth.value()
    de.bsommerfeld.pathetic.api.wrapper.PathPosition.manhattanDistance(PathPosition)
    marked for removal
    de.bsommerfeld.pathetic.api.wrapper.PathPosition.octileDistance(PathPosition)
    marked for removal
    de.bsommerfeld.pathetic.engine.factory.AStarPathfinderFactory.createPathfinder()
    Use AStarPathfinderFactory.createPathfinder(PathfinderConfiguration) with an explicit configuration that supplies a real NavigationPointProvider.
